title: Thelypteris urbani
taxonomy: Thelypteris urbani is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It belongs to the genus Thelypteris, which is a part of the Thelypteridaceae family of ferns. The family Thelypteridaceae is a part of the order Polypodiales, a large and diverse order of ferns. The order Polypodiales is a part of the class Polypodiopsida, which includes most modern ferns. This classification places Thelypteris urbani within the broader context of modern ferns.
uses: Thelypteris urbani is known for its potential medicinal properties, although limited research has been conducted on the species.
